summary: Game Tile Final Not Entitled Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is not logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is turned ON
AND the user is on the Games page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to an archive game tile
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Game <x> of <y>, <away_team>,<home_team>, Not Entitled. Press select to play game. Move <appropriate_directions> to hear more games. Move up to navigate to a new date."
